# French Food Tour Paris
> Authentic food & wine tours in Montmartre, Paris

## About
French Food Tour offers intimate 3-hour guided food and wine experiences in the Montmartre neighborhood of Paris (18th arrondissement). Led by a local guide born and raised in Montmartre. Maximum 8 guests per tour. Tastings include family-run fromageries, artisan boulangeries, natural wine caves, charcuterie and hidden panoramic terraces. Rated 4.9/5 by 200+ guests. Tours run daily, year-round.

## Key Facts
- Location: Montmartre, Paris, France (18th arrondissement)
- Meeting point: Steps of Sacré-Cœur Basilica
- Duration: 3 hours
- Group size: Maximum 8 guests
- Price: €85 per person (all tastings included)
- Languages: English (French tours available for private groups)
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before

## Contact
Email: contact@frenchfoodtour.com
Website: https://www.frenchfoodtour.com
